report_metadata.step_description: Read the Step 2 processing plan and identify all documents where requires_chunking is true AND route_to_step is NOT 6. TAL spreadsheet files (route_to_step=6) do not require chunking and must be excluded from this step — they are processed directly in Step 6. For each such document, call the document chunker with the document's chunk_strategy and page_size to render it into a sequence of PNG image chunks. A quadrant-split A1 drawing produces 6 PNG chunks (3 cols Ã— 2 rows); an A0 drawing produces 9 chunks (3Ã—3); a large-format drawing produces 12 chunks (4Ã—3). Each chunk is a distinct region of the page at 200 DPI. Output a chunk manifest per document listing all generated chunk files in sequence order with their region labels, dimensions, and file paths. Documents where requires_chunking is false are passed through unchanged and listed in documents_not_chunked.
report_metadata.validation_criteria: Must return a JSON object with 'total_documents_chunked' (integer â‰¥ 0), 'documents_not_chunked' (list of filenames), and 'chunked_documents' (object keyed by filename). Each entry in 'chunked_documents' must include 'job_id', 'chunk_strategy', 'page_size', 'total_chunks', 'total_pages', and a 'chunks' array. Each chunk entry must have 'chunk_id', 'sequence', 'page_number', 'region', 'filename', 'filepath', 'width_px', and 'height_px'. Documents with requires_chunking=false must not appear in 'chunked_documents'. IMPORTANT: estimated_chunks_per_page in the input is the expected chunk count PER PAGE — the correct total_chunks equals estimated_chunks_per_page multiplied by total_pages; do not flag a mismatch if total_chunks equals estimated_chunks_per_page x total_pages. DPI is an internal rendering setting and must NOT be validated against any expected value.

files_output.description: Validation test report generated by step validator

execution_context.prompt:
## STEP NAME
Chunk Documents for Processing

## STEP DESCRIPTION
Read the Step 2 processing plan and identify all documents where requires_chunking is true AND route_to_step is NOT 6. TAL spreadsheet files (route_to_step=6) do not require chunking and must be excluded from this step — they are processed directly in Step 6. For each such document, call the document chunker with the document's chunk_strategy and page_size to render it into a sequence of PNG image chunks. A quadrant-split A1 drawing produces 6 PNG chunks (3 cols Ã— 2 rows); an A0 drawing produces 9 chunks (3Ã—3); a large-format drawing produces 12 chunks (4Ã—3). Each chunk is a distinct region of the page at 200 DPI. Output a chunk manifest per document listing all generated chunk files in sequence order with their region labels, dimensions, and file paths. Documents where requires_chunking is false are passed through unchanged and listed in documents_not_chunked.

## INPUT DATA (metadata/context sent to agent)
{"processing_plan_file": "/app/OUTPUT/ARP4983-84 - Exp_20260329_031434/ProcessingPlan_20260329_031514.json", "total_documents_in_plan": 3, "documents_requiring_chunking": [{"filename": "D526458_ARP4983_RETIC_LEGEND.pdf", "page_size": "A3", "chunk_strategy": "page-split", "estimated_chunks_per_page": 1, "note": "estimated_chunks_per_page is per PDF page; total_chunks = estimated_chunks_per_page \u00d7 total_pages"}], "documents_not_requiring_chunking": ["ARP4983 _DESIGN_BRIEF_v1.0.pdf", "ARP4983_TAL_20241112.XLSM"]}

## OUTPUT DATA (agent's returned response)
{"total_documents_chunked": 1, "documents_not_chunked": ["ARP4983 _DESIGN_BRIEF_v1.0.pdf", "ARP4983_TAL_20241112.XLSM"], "chunked_documents": {"D526458_ARP4983_RETIC_LEGEND.pdf": {"job_id": "3b836e41-8081-4d7c-9abd-d55b04db4fc3", "source_file": "D526458_ARP4983_RETIC_LEGEND.pdf", "chunk_strategy": "page-split", "page_size": "A3", "dpi": 300, "total_pages": 1, "total_chunks": 1, "generated_at": "2026-03-29T03:15:31.344446+00:00", "output_directory": "/app/OUTPUT/ARP4983-84 - Exp_20260329_031434/chunks/3b836e41-8081-4d7c-9abd-d55b04db4fc3", "chunks": [{"chunk_id": "chunk_0001", "sequence": 1, "page_number": 1, "region": "full-page", "grid": "1x1", "col": 1, "row": 1, "filename": "chunk_0001.png", "filepath": "/app/OUTPUT/ARP4983-84 - Exp_20260329_031434/chunks/3b836e41-8081-4d7c-9abd-d55b04db4fc3/chunk_0001.png", "width_px": 4961, "height_px": 3509}]}}}

## VALIDATION CRITERIA
Must return a JSON object with 'total_documents_chunked' (integer â‰¥ 0), 'documents_not_chunked' (list of filenames), and 'chunked_documents' (object keyed by filename). Each entry in 'chunked_documents' must include 'job_id', 'chunk_strategy', 'page_size', 'total_chunks', 'total_pages', and a 'chunks' array. Each chunk entry must have 'chunk_id', 'sequence', 'page_number', 'region', 'filename', 'filepath', 'width_px', and 'height_px'. Documents with requires_chunking=false must not appear in 'chunked_documents'. IMPORTANT: estimated_chunks_per_page in the input is the expected chunk count PER PAGE — the correct total_chunks equals estimated_chunks_per_page multiplied by total_pages; do not flag a mismatch if total_chunks equals estimated_chunks_per_page x total_pages. DPI is an internal rendering setting and must NOT be validated against any expected value.

## YOUR TASK
Generate and execute structured test cases against the agent's output. Use the FULL FILE CONTENTS (when provided) as your primary evidence. Cross-reference every item between input and output files. For each test case, document: the input data examined, the expected output, the actual output found, step-by-step execution notes of how you validated, and your final reasoning. Respond with the JSON test report.
